description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for continuous integration tests of the test vector handler. The workflow should trigger on pull requests, pushes, and daily. It should have two jobs: one for tests and one for static analysis. The test job should run on a matrix of OS, Python version, architecture, and test category, and should configure AWS credentials, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies, and run tests with tox. The static analysis job should run on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of analysis categories, and should check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies, and run static analysis with tox.
